trips.2026-vegas-yosemite-sf: United States Las Vegas, Yosemite & San Francisco

expenseNotes.含英鎊支出，已換算台幣: Includes GBP spending, converted to TWD
expenseNotes.英鎊支出以40匯率換算台幣: GBP converted to TWD at a rate of 40
expenseNotes.含歐元支出，已換算台幣: Includes EUR spending, converted to TWD
expenseNotes.含歐元/英鎊支出，已換算台幣: Includes EUR and GBP spending, converted to TWD
expenseNotes.含日幣支出，已換算台幣: Includes JPY spending, converted to TWD
expenseNotes.含韓元支出，已換算台幣: Includes KRW spending, converted to TWD
expenseNotes.含人民幣支出，已換算台幣: Includes CNY spending, converted to TWD
expenseNotes.含丹麥克朗/歐元/英鎊支出，已換算台幣: Includes DKK, EUR and GBP spending, converted to TWD
expenseNotes.日幣支出以約0.224匯率換算為台幣: JPY converted to TWD at a rate of about 0.224
expenseNotes.日幣以0.21匯率換算台幣；個人花費（已排除代購）: JPY converted to TWD at a rate of 0.21; personal spending only (proxy-shopping excluded)
expenseNotes.港幣以4.1匯率換算台幣（娛樂含迪士尼門票）: HKD converted to TWD at a rate of 4.1 (entertainment includes Disneyland tickets)
expenseNotes.含臥鋪火車約3,000；赫爾辛基+羅瓦涅米+挪威合計: Includes about NT$3,000 for the sleeper train; Helsinki + Rovaniemi + Norway combined
expenseNotes.交通含船票與四趟Taxi: Transport includes ferry tickets and four taxi rides
expenseNotes.總花費（一人），機票租車油錢冰川藍冰洞全含: Total per person, including flights, car rental, fuel and the glacier ice cave tour
expenseNotes.10天9夜總計28,245台幣（依 Notion 公開總費用表）: NT$28,245 for 10 days and 9 nights (from the published total-cost table in Notion)
expenseNotes.含英鎊/歐元/里拉支出，已換算台幣（交通含倫敦來回機票）: Includes GBP, EUR and TRY spending, converted to TWD (transport includes the round-trip flight from London)
expenseNotes.美元以32匯率換算台幣；住叔叔家故無住宿（其他=sim卡與機上網路）: USD converted to TWD at a rate of 32; no accommodation cost (stayed with my uncle); other = SIM card and in-flight Wi-Fi
expenseNotes.美元以32匯率換算台幣；記帳無分類，依品項名稱歸類；交通含機票$375.2+行李: USD converted to TWD at a rate of 32; expenses were uncategorised, so items were grouped by name; transport includes flights $375.2 + baggage $35 plus car rental, fuel and towing; entertainment = horse-riding tour on the north shore; shopping excludes a $7 Hello Kitty proxy purchase
expenseNotes.美元以32匯率換算台幣；記帳無分類，依品項名稱歸類；交通含機票$125.96+行: USD converted to TWD at a rate of 32; expenses were uncategorised, so items were grouped by name; transport includes flights $125.96 + baggage $72 + car rental $312.24 plus fuel and Lyft; tickets = Desert Botanical Garden
expenseNotes.美元以32匯率換算台幣；交通含來回機票$297.96；娛樂含Chicago Ci: USD converted to TWD at a rate of 32; transport includes the $297.96 round-trip flight; entertainment includes the $144 Chicago CityPass; one Lyft ride with no amount recorded is excluded
expenseNotes.美元以32匯率換算台幣；加州迪士尼雙園一日（門票+快速通關$316）: USD converted to TWD at a rate of 32; one day at both California Disney parks (tickets + Lightning Lane $316)
expenseNotes.美元以32匯率換算台幣；三段機票與行李費按航段分攤 1/3（LAX→MCO）: USD converted to TWD at a rate of 32; the three flights and baggage fees are split by leg, 1/3 here (LAX→MCO)
expenseNotes.美元以32匯率換算台幣；三段機票與行李費按航段分攤 2/3（MCO→LGA、JF: USD converted to TWD at a rate of 32; the three flights and baggage fees are split by leg, 2/3 here (MCO→LGA, JFK→LAX)
expenseNotes.美元以32匯率換算台幣；船費=兩人總額$1,771的一半$885.5；紀念品$1: USD converted to TWD at a rate of 32; cruise fare = half of the $1,771 two-person total ($885.5); the $100.38 of souvenirs was offset by a $100 gift card and the remainder folded into other; the $125 deposit for the next cruise is excluded
expenseNotes.全部有記帳旅程加總（已換算台幣）: Total across all trips with recorded expenses (converted to TWD)
